name: AlphaFold Server (DeepMind/EMBL-EBI)
description: Structural biology platform for protein-structure prediction (AlphaFold3) with API.

seo.title: AlphaFold Server (DeepMind/EMBL-EBI) — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: AlphaFold Server (DeepMind/EMBL-EBI): Structural biology platform for protein-structure prediction (AlphaFold3) with API.

when_to_use: Predicting 3D protein structures for drug discovery research
Submitting protein sequences to AlphaFold3 API programmatically
Comparing predicted structures to experimental PDB data
Generating structure predictions for antibody-antigen complexes

review.verdict: The standard for academic structural biology; commercial teams must negotiate separately.
review.best_for: Academic and non-profit structural biology research groups
review.not_for: Pharma drug discovery pipelines needing commercial rights

lock_in.reason: Open research platform; free for academic use

developer_experience.reason: REST API and web UI; limited language SDKs
